overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game featuring a female warrior with braided hair navigating a rugged mountain landscape during golden hour. She follows a robed companion along a narrow ridge path overlooking a misty valley with a river below, showcasing high-fidelity Unreal Engine 5 graphics with detailed rock textures and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between rock walls

events.description: exits tight rocky corridor onto open mountain ridge revealing expansive vista

agents.ego_description: warrior with braided hair and leather armor navigating through rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: robed companion walking ahead on the mountain path

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock wall with rough texture
steep rock face with white mineral deposits
broken wooden posts and beams suggesting old structures
hazy valley visible between mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow mountain pass with steep rock walls on both sides. As the character emerges from the tight corridor around the 5-second mark, the view opens to reveal a vast mountain vista. A robed companion walks ahead on the gravel path, and weathered wooden ruins appear on the right side of the ridge.

events.description: valley view expands to reveal river and mist below

agents.ego_description: following the robed companion along the narrow ridge path

notable_agents.action: companion in dark robes leading the way along the ridge

entered.detail: shimmering water visible in the valley below catching golden light
layered mountain ranges fading into atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open mountain ridge with panoramic views of the valley below. The path is narrow with steep drops on one side. The companion leads ahead as the view expands to show a river winding through the misty valley floor, with distant mountains visible in the golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending path toward misty water basin

events.description: path begins descending more steeply toward the valley floor

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the sloping path toward the misty water below

notable_agents.action: companion continuing down the path ahead

entered.detail: steaming water pool visible at close range in the valley
mist rising from geothermal activity in the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the descent toward the valley floor where steam rises from geothermal pools. The path becomes steeper and the camera follows the companion closer to the misty water. The rocky terrain shifts to show more grassy patches, and the river becomes more prominent on the right side as they approach the basin.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic mountain pass that gradually opens into a vast, geothermal valley basin. It begins within a narrow corridor of steep rock walls, moving forward until the terrain suddenly expands to reveal a wide mountain vista featuring weathered wooden ruins and a gravel path. As the camera follows a robed companion along the open ridge, the perspective widens to showcase a winding river cutting through a misty valley under the warm glow of the golden hour. The scene then shifts toward a descent, where the rocky terrain gives way to grassy patches and the air fills with steam rising from geothermal pools. Finally, the camera closes in on the companion as they approach the misty waters of the basin with the river becoming prominent on the right.
